title: KandyToys SupeRetro 28 Dominoes in Tin Gift Set
features: True Classic - The SupeRetro set of 28 high quality double six dominoes set is a timeless game.
Family Fun - This classic dominoes game is a great way to practice counting skills and problem solving skills whilst boosting concentration levels.
The Perfect Gift - The dominoes set comes in a cool retro style tin, making it easy to store and fantastic for taking on the go.
description: Product Description 28 Double Six Dominoes in a metal gift tin Comes with an instruction sheet Safety Warning Choking Hazard. Small parts. Not for children under 3 years.
